name: Astro Chef
short_description: Dive into Astro Chef, a VR culinary adventure like no other! Serve exotic dishes to unique alien customers and rebuild the restaurant's reputation. Master alien ingredients, tackle cosmic puzzles, and experience the thrill of VR cooking solo or in co-op mode.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Astro Chef, your ultimate cosmic culinary adventure!


Become the galaxy's top chef in Astro Chef's chaotic kitchen! Ready to cook up a cosmic storm?

🚀 Culinary Adventure: Serve diverse dishes to alien patrons with unique preferences while navigating intergalactic kitchen challenges. Unleash creativity with alien ingredients and unique kitchen tools.

👫 Single Player & Co-op: Restore your Uncle's restaurant alone or team up in co-op. One player uses the VR headset while the other handles the Kitchen Manual. Teamwork and communication are key.

👽 Extraterrestrial Cooking: Discover perfect combinations to delight alien customers. Create stunning dishes with unique tools. Fast-paced gameplay keeps you on your toes, ensuring meals are on time.

⚠️ Kitchen Chaos: Brace for chaos with space bugs, malfunctioning tools, and 'Out of Stock' challenges. Serve swarms of alien patrons and maintain the galaxy’s top lunch spot.

🎮 Challenging Progression: Advance through themed chapters with increasing dish complexity, testing your skills and adaptability. Each shift is randomized for a fresh experience. With each stellar rating, you're closer to becoming the ultimate Astro Chef.

🎨 Stunning Visuals: Enjoy vibrant art, detailed environments, and charming alien customers. Experience VR immersion with interactive feedback.

Ready to become the next Astro Chef? Join the cosmic kitchen chaos today!



It's all about using wacky, out-of-this-world ingredients and tools to whip up the best dishes for your alien clientele. Who knew cooking in space could be this fun?


In Astro Chef, creating crazy dishes isn't enough. You'll also face wild scenarios like fixing broken tools with a hammer, dealing with EMPs, and more. Who said cooking should be boring?

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
